name: Enmity's Embrace
explicitMods: Take 392 Fire Damage when you Use a Skill
Damage Penetrates Fire Resistance equal to your Overcapped Fire Resistance, up to a maximum of 200%
flavourText: In truth, your terror is cold
You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.

name: Brimstone Ward
implicitMods: 9% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
explicitMods: +2 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText:
Supports any skill gem.
Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

+16% to Quality of Supported Skill Gems

flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants fire resistance to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 52% additional Fire Resistance
You and nearby allies gain 4% additional maximum Fire Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Marylene's Fallacy
flavourText: "Marylene stroked the medallion at her breast
before every duel and every cast of the die."
- Victario, the People's Poet

name: Armageddon Touch
implicitMods: 20% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
15% chance to Unnerve Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit
craftedMods: 24% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 19% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Nebulis
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
implicitMods: +27% to Cold Damage over Time Multiplier
explicitMods: 10% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
flavourText: The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.
explicitMods: Deals 70% of your Maximum Life as Base Fire Damage per second
Deals 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
You Burn for 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Raise Zombie Gems
+1 to Level of all Raise Spectre Gems
flavourText: The dead man walks where
the living fear to tread.

Minions from Supported Skills take 15% of Hit Damage from their Life before
you if they are your only Minion

flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Diamond Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

name: Plague Watch
implicitMods: Scorch Enemies when you Block their Damage
explicitMods: Recover 5% of Life when you Block

8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield

flavourText: He who sows an ember shall reap an inferno.

socketedItems.secDescrText: This spell creates ethereal blades which orbit in an area around you, dealing damage every 0.6 seconds to all enemies in their radius. As more blades are added, the damage becomes greater and more frequent.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Increased Critical Damage
explicitMods: 40% increased Hit Rate for each blade
Can have up to 10 active spinning blades

a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

name: The Broken Elegy
implicitMods: +22% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitMods: Trigger level 25 Ceaseless Flesh once every second
When a nearby Minion dies, gain Rotten Bulwark equal to 9% of its maximum Life
Minions gain 65% of Physical Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
flavourText: Before they 'saved' their beloved leader, the Afarud
tested their ritual on a dying man... but they made
a fatal mistake. They did not bind him to an object.
